positive.prompt: Set up OpenTelemetry tracing in my ASP.NET Core API project
Configure OpenTelemetry logs and metrics exporter for dotnet console application
Add telemetry instrumentation for EF Core in our C# app

negative.prompt: Instrument trace logging in a python django app
Write an EF Core database migration

evals.prompt: Configure OpenTelemetry in Program.cs to export traces to a local OTLP endpoint.
evals.expected_output: OTLP exporter is configured with an endpoint and trace settings.
expectations: The OpenTelemetry NuGet packages are referenced or configured
Resource builder details like service name are configured
OTLP exporter is configured with an endpoint
